records.decision: Visual pass ships vanilla + Web Animations API; Framer Motion DECLINED
records.reason: Framer Motion is a React dependency; the ratified P2 decision (vanilla JS/UMD, no build chain) is frozen and non-reopenable without a decision record. WAAPI delivers the requested motion language (spring entrances, animated fills, count-up, lock pulse) at zero dependencies. If Irfan wants to reopen the React decision, that is a NEW record superseding this one — flagged, not improvised.
